fields.name: Q1
fields.label: 1. You are satisfied with the waiting time of the IT Helpdesk Hotline.

description.view: 你對資訊科技支援熱線電話等候時間感到滿意。

fields.name: Q2
fields.label: 2. You are satisfied with the response time of email by IT Helpdesk.

description.view: 你對資訊科技支援電郵回覆時間感到滿意。

fields.name: Q3
fields.label: 3. IT Helpdesk staff is helpful to resolve your problem.

description.view: 資訊科技支援熱線職員都能幫助你解決問題。

fields.name: Q4
fields.label: 4. Overall, you are satisfied with the IT Helpdesk Hotline Service.

description.view: 整體而言, 你對資訊科技支援感到滿意。

fields.name: Q5
fields.label: 5. Does Onsite Engineer onsite support your case?

description.view: 現場維修工程人員有上門解決你的問題嗎?

fields.name: Q6
fields.label: 6. Onsite Engineer is helpful to resolve your problem.

description.view: 現場維修工程人員都能助你解決問題。

fields.name: Q7
fields.label: 7. Overall, you are satisfied with the Onsite Support Service.

description.view: 整體而言﹐你對現場維修服務感到滿意。

fields.name: Q8
fields.label: Any other comments?

description.view: 如有其他意見，請在下方說明。

options.body: We are constantly improving our service. To participate and help us serve you better, please give us your feedback.
